data.body:
>35 3PA: 13-10 = .565
31-35 3PA: 14-6 = .700
26-30 3PA: 15-8 = .652
<26 3PA: 10-6 = .625

So not quite as glaring as early in the season, I guess. But in general I observe that if they're taking a lot of threes it's because the other team has shut them out of the paint, which is a bad sign.

data.body:
Whether it was spirits or his second brain, the mauschie didn't stress over his situation. Choosing to enjoy the opportunity of being someone's seat. 'They'll get up eventually,' he thought.

Not until he heard muffled snores did he think again; noticing the growing heat and humidity, as well.
